summary: Invoice anomaly automation includes AI review and finance approval before payment release. [CONFIG][INFERENCIA]

steps.action: Load invoice and vendor policy fixture.
steps.deterministic_check: Invoice fixture has vendor_id, amount, currency, due_date.
steps.fallback: Block invoice workflow and request valid fixture.

steps.deterministic_check: Report includes anomaly_type, evidence_refs, recommendation, and confidence_basis.
steps.fallback: Route invoice to finance approver for manual review.
steps.prompt_contract: Use invoice fixture and vendor policy only.
steps.output_contract: JSON object with anomaly_type, evidence_refs, recommendation, confidence_basis.

steps.deterministic_check: Decision value is approved, rejected, or needs-info.

criteria: AI recommendation cannot release payment without approval
Payment release is an external financial effect

fallbacks: Failed AI anomaly review routes to manual finance approval. [CONFIG]
validation: Critical payment release is gated by human approval. [DOC]
risks: Vendor policy fixture completeness limits anomaly coverage. [SUPUESTO]
